name: Birthday Cake with Candles
subject: holidays/birthday

name: Birthday Balloons Bunch
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a cheerful bunch of round party balloons of different sizes floating together, their strings gathered and tied in a bow at the bottom, a few star shapes and a curling ribbon among them

name: Wrapped Birthday Present
subject: holidays/birthday

name: Happy Birthday Banner
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a festive 'Happy Birthday' bunting banner made of triangular flag pennants strung across the top, each pennant holding one big bubble letter, with small stars and confetti dots scattered around

name: Cute Birthday Cupcake
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a single big friendly cupcake with a smiling face, a swirl of frosting on top, one tall candle with a flame, a fluted paper wrapper, and a cherry, drawn with simple chunky shapes

name: Party Hat Close-Up
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a single tall cone-shaped party hat shown up close, a fuzzy pom-pom on the pointed top, a stretchy chin strap, and bold polka-dot and zigzag stripe patterns wrapping around it

name: Birthday Bear with Balloon
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a cuddly cartoon teddy bear wearing a little party hat, holding the string of a round balloon in one paw, a happy smile, sitting upright with a small wrapped gift beside it

name: Birthday Party Scene
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a lively birthday party table with a candle-topped cake in the center, balloons tied to the chairs, a stack of wrapped presents, paper streamers draped above, and party hats and plates set out

name: Birthday Cupcake Trio
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: three frosted birthday cupcakes lined up in a row, each with a different swirl of frosting topped with sprinkles, cherries, and a single candle, sitting on a small dessert tray

name: Number Candle Cake
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a rounded birthday cake with smooth frosting and a wavy icing border, topped with several thin numbered birthday candles standing in a row, lit flames flickering, a few decorative dots along the side

name: Birthday Gift Pile
subject: holidays/birthday
prompt: a cheerful stack of birthday presents of different sizes piled on top of each other, each box wrapped in its own patterned paper with a bow, a couple of balloons tied to the top box

name: Birthday Slice and Treats
subject: holidays/birthday
